productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Glinda Red Kidswear
description: CompositionCoral shorts made of 100% cotton, with elasticated waist, two patch pockets on the back with buttoned flaps, pleated foldover flap on the front and embroidered brand name on the left side of flapFittingRegular Waist - 22-24 inches Wash care Machine wash Cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detachable Get ready to indulge your little girl in the spirit of summer with these coral skorts from gini and jony. Team this with white tees and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the soft fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
